mapper.select: /** UsptStdntMtchDao.selectMtchStdnList */ select usm.last_slctn_trget_id , ubpa.apply_id , ubpa.receipt_no , ubpa.member_id , cm.member_nm , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@HOPE_CODE_GROUP}', ubpat.hope_dty_cd) as hope_dty , ua.schul_nm , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@MSVC_CODE_GROUP}', um.msvc_type_cd) as msvc_type , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@GRDTN_CODE_GROUP}', ua.grdtn_div_cd) as grdtn_div , row_number() over (order by usm.created_dt) as rn from uspt_stdnt_mtch usm inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt ubpa on ubpa.apply_id = usm.apply_id inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_apply_task ubpat on ubpat.apply_id = ubpa.apply_id inner join cmmt_member cm on cm.member_id = ubpa.member_id left outer join uspt_msvc um on um.member_id = ubpa.member_id left outer join ( select distinct on(member_id) member_id , schul_nm , grdtn_div_cd from uspt_acdmcr order by member_id, endde desc, created_dt desc ) ua on ua.member_id = ubpa.member_id where usm.last_slctn_trget_id = #{lastSlctnTrgetId} offset #{beginRowNum} -1 limit #{itemsPerPage}

sql.where:
usm.last_slctn_trget_id is null and ubpa.pblanc_id = ( select ubpa.pblanc_id from uspt_last_slctn_trget ulst inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt ubpa on ubpa.apply_id = ulst.apply_id and ubpa.slctn = true where ulst.slctn = true and ulst.last_slctn_trget_id = #{lastSlctnTrgetId} )
and ubpat.hope_dty_cd = #{hopeDtyCd}
and ubpa.receipt_no like concat('%', #{receiptNo}, '%')
and cm.member_nm like concat('%', #{memberNm}, '%')
and ubpa.rcept_dt >= to_date(#{rceptEndDate}, 'YYYYMMDD')
and ubpa.rcept_dt <= to_date(#{rceptEndDate}, 'YYYYMMDD')

mapper.select: /** UsptStdntMtchDao.selectMtchStdnList */ select count(distinct ubpa.apply_id) from uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt ubpa inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_apply_task ubpat on ubpat.apply_id = ubpa.apply_id inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp on ubp.pblanc_id = ubpa.pblanc_id inner join uspt_bsns ub on ub.bsns_cd = ubp.bsns_cd inner join uspt_stdr_bsns usb on usb.stdr_bsns_cd = ub.stdr_bsns_cd and usb.bsns_type_cd = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@BT_EDC_CODE_GROUP}' inner join cmmt_member cm on cm.member_id = ubpa.member_id and cm.member_type = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@MBR_IND_CODE_GROUP}' left outer join uspt_stdnt_mtch usm on usm.last_slctn_trget_id in ( select ulst2.last_slctn_trget_id from uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt ubpa2 inner join uspt_last_slctn_trget ulst2 on ulst2.apply_id = ubpa2.apply_id and ulst2.slctn = true where ubpa2.pblanc_id = ( select ubpa.pblanc_id from uspt_last_slctn_trget ulst inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt ubpa on ubpa.apply_id = ulst.apply_id where ulst.slctn = true and ulst.last_slctn_trget_id = #{lastSlctnTrgetId} ) and ubpa2.slctn = true ) and usm.apply_id = ubpa.apply_id

/** UsptStdntMtchDao.selectMtchStdnList */ select ubpa.apply_id , ubpa.receipt_no , cm.member_nm , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@HOPE_CODE_GROUP}', ubpat.hope_dty_cd) as hope_dty , ubp.pblanc_nm , case when ubp.ordtm_rcrit = true then '상시모집' else '정시모집' end as ordtm_rcrit , case when ubp.ordtm_rcrit = true then concat(cast(ubpa.rcept_odr as varchar), '차') else '' end as rcept_odr , usm.last_slctn_trget_id , row_number() over (order by ubpa.created_dt) as rn from uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt ubpa inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_apply_task ubpat on ubpat.apply_id = ubpa.apply_id inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc ubp on ubp.pblanc_id = ubpa.pblanc_id inner join uspt_bsns ub on ub.bsns_cd = ubp.bsns_cd inner join uspt_stdr_bsns usb on usb.stdr_bsns_cd = ub.stdr_bsns_cd and usb.bsns_type_cd = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@BT_EDC_CODE_GROUP}' inner join cmmt_member cm on cm.member_id = ubpa.member_id and cm.member_type = '${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@MBR_IND_CODE_GROUP}' left outer join uspt_stdnt_mtch usm on usm.last_slctn_trget_id in ( select ulst2.last_slctn_trget_id from uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt ubpa2 inner join uspt_last_slctn_trget ulst2 on ulst2.apply_id = ubpa2.apply_id and ulst2.slctn = true where ubpa2.pblanc_id = ( select ubpa.pblanc_id from uspt_last_slctn_trget ulst inner join uspt_bsns_pblanc_applcnt ubpa on ubpa.apply_id = ulst.apply_id where ulst.slctn = true and ulst.last_slctn_trget_id = #{lastSlctnTrgetId} ) and ubpa2.slctn = true ) and usm.apply_id = ubpa.apply_id
